return k(B)end,function(Y,D)local k=v(D)local G=function(G,h,c,H,B,J)return n(Y,{G;h;c,H,B;J},D,k)end return G end,function(Y,D)local k=v(D)local G=function(G,h,c,H)return n(Y,{G;h;c,H},D,k)end return G end,function(Y,D)local k=v(D)local G=function(...)return n(Y,{...},D,k)end return G end,function(Y)for D=342947-342946,#Y,219117-219116 do e[Y[D]]=(556073-556072)+e[Y[D]]end if G then local n=G(true)local k=c(n)k[D(-367791-(-415449))],k[D(-310471+360180)],k[D(-437203-(-485607))]=Y,I,function()return 801363-(-89566)end return n else return h({},{[D(-306776+356485)]=I;[D(-658655-(-706313))]=Y,[D(-337393+385797)]=function()return 1674577-783648 end})end end,function(Y,D)local k=v(D)local G=function()return n(Y,{},D,k)end return G end,function(Y)e[Y]=e[Y]-(-611962+611963)if e[Y]==413415-413415 then e[Y],J[Y]=nil,nil end end return(Z(-928197+8851608,{}))(k(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[D(-836664+886177)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
